calendar.matters:
Petition For (1) Order Appointing Successor Trustee, And (2) Instructions Regarding Construction Of Will/Trust Instrument.
Off Calendar Jan-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kimberly Taylor for Michael Murphy (Petitoner). Carl Durham for Lauren Murphy.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court approved appointment of Michael Murphy as Successor Trustee and took the issue of construction of the Trust under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip.

Petition For (1) Order Appointing Successor Trustee, And (2) Instructions Regarding Construction Of Will/Trust Instrument.
Off Calendar Nov-02-2011 Continued To Dec-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kimberly Taylor for Michael Murphy (Petitioner). Carl Durham for Lauren Murphy.

The Petition for Order Appointing Successor Trustee, etc. was continued to December 7, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a Petition for Appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem, for re-filing of the opposition and to revisit the issue of bond. The opposition is to be filed by November 16, 2011. The response is to be filed by November 30, 2011.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition For (1) Order Appointing Successor Trustee, And (2) Instructions Regarding Construction Of Will/Trust Instrument.
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Continued To Nov-02-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
